title: Implement event queue system
description: Create python/src/lichen/sim/events.py. Priority queue sorted by time. Event base class with time field. Subclasses: TxStartEvent, TxEndEvent, RxTimeoutEvent. EventQueue class: push(event), pop() -> Event, peek() -> Event | None, is_empty() -> bool. All times in microseconds (int). Unit tests for ordering, ties broken by insertion order.
close_reason: Wave 2 complete. 187 tests pass, ruff clean.
